message:
feat: add automatic config backup and history/restore commands

Implements savant_elite_rust-1hk:
- Automatic backup of current config before any save operation
- New 'savant config history' command to list recent configurations
- New 'savant config restore <N>' command to restore previous config
- Backup rotation (keeps last 10 by default, configurable via SAVANT_HISTORY_SIZE)
- Timestamp-based backup names for chronological sorting
- Full JSON output support for both commands
- 8 new integration tests for history/restore functionality

Backups stored in ~/.config/savant-elite/history/YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSS.conf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
